summary: Replayed ADR 0115 from the latest origin/main integration branch, re-projected the ledger DSN and NATS URL into the live Windmill runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, recovered the Windmill worker containers after a startup race, and verified a fresh guest-side mutation write through both ledger.events and the compatibility audit_log view.

verification.observed: Focused ADR 0115 validation passed on the mainline integration worktree with `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_compose_runtime_secret_injection.py tests/unit/test_ledger_writer.py -q` returning `20 passed`, plus `make syntax-check-windmill` and `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-windmill` completing successfully.

The 2026-03-27 replay projected `LV3_LEDGER_DSN` and `LV3_LEDGER_NATS_URL` into `/run/lv3-secrets/windmill/runtime.env` on `docker-runtime-lv3`, and `docker exec windmill-windmill_worker-1 env` showed both variables inside the live worker container after targeted worker recovery.

The mainline replay left the operator entrypoint healthy with `curl -fsS http://100.64.0.1:8005/api/version` returning `CE v1.662.0`, and `docker compose -f /opt/windmill/docker-compose.yml ps` showed `windmill_server`, `windmill_worker`, `windmill_worker_native`, `windmill_extra`, and `openbao-agent` up.

A guest-local `scripts/mutation_audit.py --emit` on `docker-runtime-lv3` with explicit exported `LV3_LEDGER_DSN` and `LV3_LEDGER_NATS_URL` wrote `2|execution.completed|operator:ops|host|proxmox-host|ws0115-main-ledger-emit-20260327T044831Z` into `ledger.events`, and the compatibility `audit_log` view exposed `2|2026-03-27 04:48:32+00:00|operator|ops|windmill|execution.completed|proxmox-host|success|ws0115-main-ledger-emit-20260327T044831Z|receipts/live-applies/2026-03-27-adr-0115-mutation-ledger-mainline-live-apply.json`.
The tamper probe `UPDATE ledger.events SET event_type='tampered' WHERE id = (SELECT max(id) FROM ledger.events)` failed with `ledger.events is append-only`.

`make validate` was exercised from the same integration worktree, progressed through the full tracked playbook syntax sweep after excluding `playbooks/.metadata-template.yml`, and then stopped in `yamllint` on the pre-existing indentation damage in `docs/adr/.index.yaml`.

The replayed `make converge-windmill` recovered from a Windmill container startup race and successfully updated the runtime env projection, but the full automation later failed in `sync_windmill_seed_scripts.py` on `f/lv3/operator_onboard` with `Remote end closed connection without response`; a targeted `docker compose -f /opt/windmill/docker-compose.yml up -d windmill_worker windmill_worker_native` restored the workers and allowed ADR 0115 verification to complete.

notes: This receipt supplements the original 2026-03-26 ADR 0115 live-apply evidence by proving the Windmill runtime projection from the latest origin/main integration branch rather than the earlier workstream branch.

The ledger row written during this replay used `metadata.legacy_correlation_id`, because `scripts/mutation_audit.py` writes legacy mutation-audit events through `LedgerWriter.write_mutation_audit_event()`.
No new SQL legacy rows were migrated on 2026-03-27; the production compatibility view and append-only trigger from the 2026-03-26 rollout remained in place.

The remaining failure observed during the replay is broader than ADR 0115 itself: `sync_windmill_seed_scripts.py` intermittently loses the connection while syncing `f/lv3/operator_onboard` after Windmill restarts. The ADR 0115 surfaces were nevertheless verified end to end after targeted worker recovery.
